name: Tulip Supermarkt
description: Tulip Supermarkt is a supermarket chain in Suriname stocking fresh produce, groceries, household essentials and a solid selection of international products. Part of the Amazone Retail group, with multiple locations across Paramaribo and the interior.

name: A La John
description: A La John is more than just a restaurant; it’s a celebration of taste, culture, and innovation. Our skilled chefs, led by the talented Chef John, blend traditional flavors with modern techniques to create culinary masterpieces that tantalize the senses. With a commitment to using only the freshest, locally-sourced ingredients, we ensure that every dish

name: AC bar & restaurant
description: AC Bar & Restaurant in Paramaribo serves Brazilian-inspired food and cocktails, with caipirinhas as the house speciality. The menu covers grilled meats, snacks and a solid drinks list — popular for after-work drinks and weekend social dining.

name: Afobaka Resort
description: Afobaka Resort sits on the edge of the Brokopondo Reservoir in Suriname's interior — a remote eco-lodge surrounded by tropical rainforest and accessible by road from Paramaribo (roughly 3–4 hours). A starting point for boat trips on the reservoir and access into the interior jungle.

name: Akira Overwater Resort
description: Stay overnight in one of the detached overwater lodges at the most luxurious resort in Bigi Pan. name: Baka Foto Restaurant
description: Baka Foto Restaurant sits across the Suriname River from central Paramaribo, reached by a short ferry crossing that's part of the experience. Known for Surinamese and Creole cooking in a historical waterfront setting, with an open-air terrace overlooking the river.

name: Bar Zuid
description: Bar Zuid is a popular bar and casual restaurant in Paramaribo, known for its pizzas, burgers and cold drinks in a neighbourhood setting. Draws a mixed local crowd — families early in the evening, a more social scene later on.

name: Bed Bath & More (BB&M)
description: Bed Bath & More (BB&M) in Paramaribo carries home textiles, bedding, bathroom accessories and lifestyle products from international brands including Birkenstock and Calvin Klein homeware lines. A retail stop for quality household items and gifts with a curated brand mix.

name: Bit Dynamics N.V.
description: We’re a young, flexible and creative software development company that specializes in developing web-based solutions such as websites, web applications, mobile applications and Digital Signage Solutions.  Bit Dynamics was founded in January 2012 and focusses on: – Web Design – ⁠Web Application development – ⁠Mobile Application development – ⁠Web & Domain Hosting – ⁠Service & Support Vision

name: Bloom Wellness Café
description: Bloom Wellness Café is a holistic café in Paramaribo combining healthy food and drinks with wellness services. The menu focuses on plant-based dishes, smoothies and health-conscious options — the kind of place that attracts the fitness and wellness crowd for both food and treatment bookings.

name: Bori Tori
description: Bori Tori is a Surinamese restaurant in Paramaribo serving dishes from across the country's diverse culinary traditions — Hindustani, Javanese, Creole and Chinese-Surinamese. Especially known for its curry dishes and traditional Surinamese lunch plates.

name: Bronbella Villa Residence
description: Bronbella Villa Residence is a boutique holiday villa complex in Suriname, set in tropical grounds with private pool access and self-contained accommodation. Positioned for guests wanting privacy and outdoor space rather than hotel services.

name: Carpe Diem Massagepraktijk
description: Carpe Diem Massagepraktijk is a massage therapy practice in Paramaribo offering full-body massage, head and neck treatment, shoulder and back therapy, and reflexology. Suited to both relaxation and therapeutic needs, with appointments available for individuals and couples.

name: Chi Min
description: Chi Min is a family-run Chinese restaurant in central Paramaribo operating since 1989. Serves traditional Chinese dishes — dim sum, noodle soups, stir-fries and rice plates — at consistently affordable prices. A local institution with a loyal multigenerational customer base.

name: Cola Kreek Recreatiepark
description: Colakreek Recreation Park is a popular day-trip destination from Paramaribo, built around a natural creek where visitors swim, picnic and cool off in the forest. About 40 km from the capital, it gets busy on weekends with families and groups — arrive early for the best spots.

name: Courtyard by Marriott
description: Get away to our Paramaribo hotel near the Suriname River Overlooking the Suriname River, Courtyard Paramaribo offers contemporary comfort near celebrated downtown attractions. Retreat within spacious hotel accommodations with complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi, international TV channels and ergonomic workspace. Upgrade to a spacious suite and enjoy whirlpool tubs, thoughtful perks and scenic views of the river

name: De Spot
description: De Spot is a Surinamese restaurant in Paramaribo known for traditional local dishes spanning Creole, Hindustani, Javanese and Chinese-Surinamese cooking. A reliable introduction to the country's food culture for visitors, and a regular lunch spot for locals.

name: De Verdieping
description: De Verdieping is a bar and restaurant in central Paramaribo with a loyal local crowd, a relaxed upstairs setting and a menu of Surinamese and international dishes. Known more for its atmosphere than its food — the kind of place regulars return to weekly.

name: Delete Beauty Lounge
description: Delete Beauty Lounge is a beauty and laser clinic in Paramaribo offering laser hair removal, semi-permanent makeup, lash and brow treatments, skin care and facial services. Aimed at clients looking for results-driven treatments rather than a traditional salon experience.

name: Divergent Body Jewelry
description: Divergent Body Jewelry is a body piercing and jewellery shop in Suriname stocking body rings, barbells, cartilage studs and jewellery for all common piercing types. Also handles professional piercing services with hygiene-standard aftercare guidance.

name: DJ Liquor Store
description: DJ Liquor Store is a drinks retailer in Paramaribo stocking wine, whisky, rum, beer, gin and non-alcoholic beverages. Good selection of international spirits and local Surinamese rum labels, with competitive pricing on case purchases.

name: D-Li Travel & Consultancy
description: Our travel agency assists with selling flight tickets, visa applications, travel insurance, accommodation, transport, documentation, tours (on request) and consultations (e.g.: stay permits)

name: EagleMedia
description: EagleMedia is a Surinamese media and digital marketing agency offering content creation, social media management and advertising services. Helping Surinamese businesses build their online presence.

name: EC Operations
description: EC Operations is a Surinamese business development and consultancy firm offering training, project support and operational advisory services to companies and organisations. Active in organisational development, business process improvement and capacity building.

name: Eco-Resort Miano

It’s location is perfect to connect with the locals and having to reconnect with nature

name: Eco Torarica
description: Eco Torarica is a boutique eco-lodging option in Paramaribo combining comfort with a focus on sustainable tourism. Close to the city's historic inner district and the Suriname River, it works well as a base for exploring both urban Paramaribo and the surrounding natural environment.

name: Ekay Media
description: Ekay Media is a Surinamese photo and video production company covering events, commercial shoots, brand content and documentary work. Based in Paramaribo, the studio handles projects ranging from social media content to full production assignments.

name: El Patron Latin Grill
description: El Patron Latin Grill was created by the brothers Lachman, two overworked gentlemen, who often found themselves wishing they were in the beautiful tropical rainforest of Suriname, with a half empty extra large cocktail! name: Eline's Pizza
description: Food that makes your heart smile. To us it’s not just about serving great food; It’s about an experience that spreads joy. For those looking for a twist on tradition our menu is created to give customers unique pizza flavors. Next to our pizza’s our mini pizzas, make for a perfect light and flavorful meal

name: FATUM Schadeverzekering N.V.
description: FATUM Schadeverzekering N.V. is one of Suriname's major non-life insurance companies, offering motor, property, liability and corporate insurance. Part of the Guardian Group, FATUM provides trusted insurance solutions across the Caribbean and Suriname.

name: Fly AllWays
description: Fly AllWays is a Surinamese airline operating charter flights and scheduled routes across the Caribbean, Central America and South America. A practical option for regional connections not served by the major carriers, including routes to and from Johan Adolf Pengel International Airport.

name: Fort Zeelandia
description: Fort Zeelandia is Paramaribo's iconic 17th-century fort on the banks of the Suriname River, now housing the Surinaams Museum. Explore Suriname's colonial history through artefacts, exhibits and the fort's remarkable architecture.

Now, almost 2 decades later, GALAXY has matured

name: Garden of Eden
description: Garden of Eden is a Thai restaurant in Paramaribo serving dishes built around the classic Thai flavour balance — sweet, sour, salty, spicy and bitter. The menu covers curries, noodle dishes and sharing plates, with a calm setting suited to a proper sit-down meal.

name: GoE Thai Noodle Bar
description: GoE Thai Noodle Bar is a Thai restaurant in Paramaribo serving noodle soups, stir-fries and classic Thai dishes with a focus on authentic flavour profiles. A more casual dining option than the upmarket Thai spots, with quick service and a straightforward menu.

name: H Garden
description: H Garden is a nursery and garden supply store in Wanica offering plants, gardening tools and outdoor products. A trusted resource for home gardeners and landscaping enthusiasts in Suriname.

name: Hairstudio 32
description: Hairstudio 32 is a hair salon in Paramaribo offering cuts, colour, treatments and styling for women. Known for technical colour work and personalised styling, with a regular clientele that books ahead for appointment slots.

description: Have you ever experienced the wonderful magic of Surinamese bee’s on your skin?? Get acquainted with Handmade by Farrell N.V. No preservatives or synthetic smell and color enhancers are added. Our products can be used

description: Hard Rock Cafe Suriname is the local franchise of the global music and dining brand, serving American-style burgers, ribs and cocktails in a rock memorabilia-lined space in central Paramaribo. Popular with both tourists and locals for the reliable menu and lively atmosphere.

name: Hermitage Mall
description: Hermitage Mall is one of Paramaribo's main shopping centres, housing fashion retailers, opticians, electronics, food outlets, a cinema and personal care services across multiple floors. Centrally located with parking, it covers most shopping needs in a single trip.

description: Het Koto Museum in Paramaribo documents the traditional dress of Surinamese Creole women — the koto — through an exhibition of historical garments, photographs and cultural context. A small but focused museum for anyone interested in Suriname's cultural heritage and textile traditions.

description: Enjoy Surinam like you never did before. name: Honeycare

name: Hotel Palacio
description: Hotel Palacio is a centrally located hotel in the historic heart of Paramaribo. Housed in a beautifully restored colonial building, it offers comfortable rooms with character, making it an excellent base for exploring the UNESCO World Heritage inner city.

name: Hotel Peperpot
description: Hotel Peperpot is a unique nature retreat on a former plantation estate in Commewijne, across the river from Paramaribo. Guests stay in restored plantation buildings surrounded by rainforest, with easy access to Peperpot Nature Park and river dolphin tours.

name: Houttuyn Wellness River Resort
description: Houttuyn Wellness River Resort is a river resort in Suriname set in tropical garden grounds along the water, offering villa accommodation, a pool, spa services and a restaurant. About 30 minutes from Paramaribo, it's a popular weekend escape for city residents and visiting guests.

name: INEFFABLE

We launched in October 2016 to help companies communicate with their clients in a relatable way. Our services: – Social media strategy – Project management – Reporting & Analytics – Advertising Management – Content Creation – Video

name: Inksane Tattoos
description: Inksane Tattoos is a tattoo studio located in Paramaribo, Suriname. The tattoo studio where we use the best of the best tattoo supplies to keep our standards high and a place where you can expect quality.

description: The International Mall of Suriname (IMS) in Paramaribo is the country's largest shopping centre, housing fashion retailers, electronics stores, supermarkets, food outlets and services under one roof. Anchored by major local and international chains, it's the main destination for big-day shopping in the capital.

name: Jacana Amazon Wellness Resort
description: Inspired by the natural beauty of our pristine rainforest, rich native culture, and unique heritage, Jacana Hotel is Suriname’s first authentic Amazon Wellness Resort. Located in our capital city of Paramaribo and themed after the lush tropical interior of Suriname, you can retreat to an outdoor ambiance.

name: Joden Savanne
description: Joden Savanne is the archaeological remains of one of the oldest Jewish settlements in the Americas, located in Suriname's Para district. Accessible by boat, it is a significant heritage destination with historic cemetery, ruins and nature.

name: Joey D's
description: Joey D’s is a standout restaurant in Paramaribo known for its nutritious, locally-sourced cuisine and as a culinary training ground led by the nationally recognized chef, Joey Dragman. It’s a place where food lovers can enjoy fresh, expertly prepared meals and where aspiring chefs can grow.

name: Julia's Food
description: Julia's Food is a health-focused café and restaurant in Paramaribo serving fresh salads, grain bowls and smoothies. Aimed at lunch crowds looking for a lighter alternative to the city's heavier local food — popular with office workers and fitness-conscious diners.

name: Kasan Snacks
description: Kasan Snacks is a Surinamese snack producer making chips from banana, cassava and other local crops. Products are sold at supermarkets and outlets across Paramaribo, with a focus on local ingredients and traditional Surinamese flavours.

name: Kirpalani
description: Kirpalani’s N.V., an active enterprise situated in the center of Paramaribo, has evolved into a well-known brand within our community. Originally established as a modest yet remarkable wooden store located at the intersection of Jodenbree and Maagdenstraat, the company, under adept leadership, has expanded to become one of Suriname’s largest and most significant businesses.
address: Maagden-, Dominee- en J.A.Pengelstraat, Paramaribo, Suriname

description: KLM Royal Dutch Airlines operates direct flights between Amsterdam Schiphol and Paramaribo's Johan Adolf Pengel International Airport. The main European carrier for Suriname, with connections onward to the KLM network across Europe and beyond.

description: Lili's is a women's fashion boutique in Paramaribo carrying upmarket clothing, accessories and footwear aimed at a style-conscious clientele. Known for quality pieces and a carefully selected range rather than fast fashion volumes.

name: Lioness Beauty Effects
description: Lioness Beauty Effects is a waxing and brow specialist in Paramaribo offering waxing, henna brows, lash lift and tint, brow lamination and lip blush. Focused specifically on hair removal and brow shaping rather than a full salon service.

name: Micki's Palace Noord
description: Micki's Palace Noord is the northern Paramaribo branch of the popular Surinamese restaurant, serving comfort food, local dishes and a broad menu covering everything from simple lunch plates to full dinner meals for families and groups.

name: Micki's Palace Zuid
description: Micki's Palace Zuid is the southern Paramaribo location of the local comfort-food restaurant chain. A popular spot for Surinamese and international dishes in a relaxed setting, suited to family dinners and casual group meals.

name: N.V. Threefold Quality System Support

name: N.V. ZING Manufacturing
description: N.V. ZING Manufacturing is a Surinamese production company with a service focus on quality output and client satisfaction. Active in manufacturing and production services for commercial clients in Paramaribo and beyond.

name: Oxygen Resort

name: Pane E Vino
description: Pane e Vino is a charming Italian restaurant that promises an authentic taste of Italy. description: Peperpot Nature Park in Commewijne is a former plantation transformed into a birding paradise just 10 minutes from Paramaribo by ferry. Over 200 species have been recorded in this accessible natural sanctuary.

description: Plantage Frederiksdorp is a plantation resort on the Commewijne River combining a small museum, a slavery heritage trail and riverfront accommodation. Reached by boat from Paramaribo, the site is one of the best-preserved plantation estates in Suriname and worth the trip for anyone interested in the country's colonial history.

name: Readytex Souvenirs and Crafts
description: Readytex Souvenirs and Crafts is a well-established Surinamese arts and crafts retailer in Paramaribo, founded in 1984. Stocks original artwork, textiles, locally made jewellery, carvings and Surinamese cultural souvenirs — one of the best places in Paramaribo to buy quality local crafts.

name: Recreatie Oord Carolina Kreek

As you arrive at Carolina Creek, you’re greeted by the gentle sounds of the flowing water

description: Rich Skin is a skin care brand and studio in Suriname focusing on organic and plant-based formulations for face and body care. Products are aimed at customers with sensitive skin or those looking for a cleaner alternative to conventional cosmetics.

name: Rock Fitness Paramaribo
description: Rock Fitness Paramaribo: The go-to spot for personal training and effective workouts! From functional fitness and bodybuilding to CrossFit and ladies toning—get stronger, fitter, and more confident. At Rock Fitness, we help you reach your goals with expert guidance and an empowering atmosphere!

name: Rogom Farm N.V.
description: Rogom Farm N.V. is an agricultural layer hen operation in Suriname producing fresh eggs and egg-based products including handmade mayonnaise. Supplies direct to consumers and commercial buyers, with products made from farm-fresh eggs and natural ingredients.

name: Royal Brasil Hotel
description: Royal Brasil Hotel offers luxurious accommodation at an accessible price in Paramaribo. Featuring well-appointed rooms, attentive service and a convenient city-centre location, it consistently earns top reviews as one of Suriname's best-value upscale hotels.

name: Royal Breeze Hotel Paramaribo
description: Royal Breeze Hotel Paramaribo is a city-centre hotel within walking distance of the historic waterfront and the Suriname River. Offers standard rooms and suites with the usual business hotel amenities, well-positioned for exploring central Paramaribo on foot.

name: Royal Rose Yoni Spa
description: Royal Rose Yoni Spa in Paramaribo specialises in feminine wellness treatments including yoni steaming, body wraps and holistic massage. One of the few venues in Suriname focused specifically on women's wellness rituals and intimate self-care.

name: Royal Spa
description: Royal Spa is a premium full-service spa in Paramaribo offering massages, facials, body treatments and beauty services in a luxurious setting.

name: Royal Torarica
description: Royal Torarica is Paramaribo's most upmarket hotel, set in a landscaped riverside property with a pool, casino, multiple restaurants and conference facilities. The benchmark for luxury accommodation in Suriname, frequently used for government and business events.

name: Royal Wellness Lounge
description: At Royal Wellness Lounge, we prioritize inner peace, offering a range of treatments designed to help you unwind and relax. Situated in the tranquil surroundings of Paramaribo, this wellness retreat invites you to step back from the hustle and bustle and indulge in their relaxing atmosphere and pampering products​.

name: Seen Stories
description: At Seen Stories, we uncover and share meaningful community stories. With six years of experience, we specialize in storytelling through documentaries and corporate commercials. Our goal is to create impactful stories that inspire, educate, and connect—both locally and internationally. Most importantly, we want people to feel seen, heard, and valued.

name: SHLX Collection
description: SHLX Collection is a Surinamese activewear brand for women, producing sports leggings, tops and gym sets. Sold primarily online and at pop-ups in Paramaribo, with a local production focus and sizes aimed at the Surinamese market.

name: Souposo
description: Souposo is a popular soup bar in Paramaribo offering fresh, flavorful soups and Surinamese dishes with a creative twist, catering to all diets with its varied menu. It’s a great spot for a tasty meal or a business meet-up.

description: Stukaderen in Nederland is a Surinamese plastering and finishing contractor specialising in interior wall and ceiling work. Services cover both residential and commercial projects, with experience in Dutch construction standards for Surinamese clients working across both markets.

name: Suraniyat
description: Suraniyat is a Surinamese fashion house producing clothing rooted in traditional craft techniques and cultural motifs. The brand works with artisan methods and cultural expression — positioned between fashion and wearable craft, with a small-batch production approach.

name: Surimami Store
description: Surimami Store is a Surinamese online and physical retail brand offering locally inspired products, gifts and everyday essentials. Proud to showcase and support Surinamese-made products.

description: Surinam Airways is the national airline of Suriname, operating scheduled flights connecting Paramaribo to destinations across the Caribbean, South America and Europe, including direct services to Amsterdam. name: Switi Momenti Candles & Crafts
description: Switi Momenti is a Surinamese candle and crafts brand offering beautifully scented handmade candles and artisan gift products. Perfect for personal indulgence or unique Surinamese gifts.
